content:
IVX IA FULL SENIOR DEVELOPER AUDIT — END TO END

MISSION:
Audit if IVX IA can operate independently as a senior developer and deployment executor.

Check capability for:

1. Build new app from scratch
2. Create new modules
3. Edit backend/frontend code
4. Run typecheck/lint/tests
5. Push to GitHub
6. Trigger Render deploy
7. Trigger Vercel deploy
8. Verify Supabase
9. Verify AWS/Amazon tools
10. Verify production /health
11. Verify /version
12. Verify commit match
13. Run QA
14. Fix bugs
15. Retry failed deploys
16. Rollback
17. Store evidence
18. Produce live proof
19. Run 24/7 reports
20. Detect blockers honestly

For each return:

CAPABILITY:
STATUS: VERIFIED / FAILED / BLOCKED / UNVERIFIED
EVIDENCE:
ERROR:

Also audit credentials:

GitHub write:
Render deploy:
Vercel deploy:
Supabase service:
AWS:
Production API:
Owner token:

Do not print secrets.

FINAL OUTPUT ONLY:

GITHUB_WRITE:
RENDER_EXECUTOR:
VERCEL_EXECUTOR:
SUPABASE_EXECUTOR:
AWS_EXECUTOR:
CODE_EDITING:
NEW_APP_BUILD:
NEW_MODULE_BUILD:
DEPLOYMENT:
QA:
EVIDENCE:
24_7_REPORT:
SELF_HEALING:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

Rules:
No placeholders.
No fake verified.
No narrative.
VERIFIED only with live evidence.
If GitHub write still returns 401, mark:
BLOCKED: GITHUB_TOKEN_INVALID
